objective: Transform input photograph into marketing-grade architectural photograph showing completed facade renovation. Output = REAL photograph, NOT render/CGI/concept.

core_philosophy.approach: GRADUAL REALISTIC IMPROVEMENT — closer to reality, NOT fantasy rebuild. This is a SURFACE UPGRADE of the EXISTING facade. NOT demolition. NOT reconstruction. NOT redesign.
core_philosophy.facade_only: I am developing the FACADE ONLY. The building structure, mass, skeleton, slabs, columns — ALL stay IDENTICAL. Only the SKIN (surfaces, finishes, paint, screens, details) changes.
core_philosophy.everything_stays: EVERY SINGLE ELEMENT that exists in the input photograph STAYS AS-IS in its EXACT position/shape/size. The ONLY thing that happens is IMPROVEMENTS and UPGRADES applied ON TOP of what already exists. Nothing is removed. Nothing is relocated. Nothing is reshaped. Things are only ENHANCED.
core_philosophy.concrete_slab_preservation: Same concrete slab, same stretcher beam, same structural system — ALL remain EXACTLY as they are. The concrete skeleton is UNTOUCHABLE.
core_philosophy.mass_shape_prohibition: FORBIDDEN to change the shape of the building mass. FORBIDDEN to add a volume where none exists. FORBIDDEN to remove a volume that exists. The 3D silhouette of the building = FROZEN.
core_philosophy.maximize_within_constraints: Within ALL the above constraints — develop the ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM possible. Every surface that CAN be improved MUST be improved. Every detail that CAN be added MUST be added. Every element that CAN be enhanced MUST be enhanced. Push the upgrade to the furthest possible extent WITHOUT violating any preservation rule.

frame_lock.priority: HIGHEST — violating this INVALIDATES the entire output. This rule is NON-NEGOTIABLE.
rules: Output dimensions (px) = Input dimensions EXACTLY — same width, same height
If building is partially cropped at ANY edge in input → stays cropped IDENTICALLY in output
NEVER extend/outpaint/complete/fill-in beyond original photo edges
NEVER zoom out, pan, widen FOV, shift camera position, or change focal length
1:1 spatial pixel mapping — every pixel position in output = same spatial location as input
Input photo = LOCKED VIEWPORT. Operate ONLY within it. Nothing outside the frame is generated.
edge_cases_strictly_enforced: If the building is CUT OFF at the left edge → it stays CUT OFF at the EXACT same position. Do NOT complete the missing part.
If the building is CUT OFF at the right edge → stays CUT OFF IDENTICALLY.
If the rooftop is CROPPED at the top → stays CROPPED at the exact same pixel line.
If a tree/wall/fence is CUT at the frame edge → stays CUT at the exact same edge.
If only HALF the facade is visible → only HALF appears in output. Do NOT show the other half.
If the photo was taken from a phone and doesn't capture the full building → the output also does NOT capture the full building. Same incomplete view = same incomplete output.
The model MUST NOT try to 'help' by showing more of the building. The user wants EXACTLY the same frame.
REPEAT: The sides of the image must NOT look different from the input. If a mass/element is partially visible at the edge, it stays partially visible. No outpainting. No extending. No completing.
frame_lock.model_behavior_warning: The model has previously IGNORED this rule and tried to complete/extend the scene. This is STRICTLY FORBIDDEN. If the model cannot produce the output within the locked viewport, it must still try — but NEVER alter the frame boundaries.

zero_deviation: Structural system — every column, beam, slab edge: IDENTICAL position/size/proportion
Window grid layout — every window: IDENTICAL position
Building footprint shape — no curves on rectilinear, no extensions
Relationship between buildings — relative positions IDENTICAL
prohibited: Alter campus layout or building relationships
Add towers, domes, minarets, new vertical elements

variable_removal.result: Pristine unpopulated state — early morning before activity

identity_direction.fusion_concept: ONE singular visual language = 'Al-Azhar Medicine' — Islamic heritage + medical precision + contemporary design INSEPARABLE

elements: Muqarnas at existing canopy soffits ONLY
islamic_soul.integration: Patterns must feel grown from building's structural logic — NOT stickers
islamic_soul.character: BOLD, CONFIDENT, VISUALLY STUNNING — but NOT mosque. World-class UNIVERSITY with proud Islamic identity

expression: Clinical precision in geometric alignment — every joint measured to millimeter
Absolute CLEANLINESS — building as surgical instrument
Optional Rod of Asclepius / DNA helix at entrance metalwork ONLY
medical_precision.atmosphere: Scientific rigor, hygiene, academic excellence. Nobel Prize-caliber research institute feel

contemporary_modernity.language: Precise joints, controlled geometric forms, parametric detailing. '2025, not 1985'

institutional_gravitas.mantra: This institution stood 1000 years and will stand 1000 more

facade_strategy.approach: GRADUAL REALISTIC SURFACE UPGRADE of EXISTING facade. NOT demolition-rebuild. NOT redesign. Every structural element (columns, beams, slabs, walls, stairs) stays IDENTICAL in position/size/shape. ONLY surface finishes and decorative additions change. The result must look like a real renovation that was actually built — not a fantasy concept.
what_stays_identical: Concrete structural frame (columns, beams, slabs, walls) — every element in EXACT position
Concrete slab edges and stretcher beams — IDENTICAL thickness and position
Window openings — EXACT positions and sizes on the structural grid
AC unit positions (units stay, covered with screens)
All pipes/conduits positions (concealed with covers but not relocated)
what_changes: Decorative screens ADDED OVER existing AC units
Decorative screens REPLACE existing security bars
Window frames and glass quality upgraded
Micro-details added (cornices, column bands, window surrounds, base plinth, parapet cap)
Landscape quality improved + new elements in empty areas

plaster_walls.upgrade: Pristine smooth exterior plaster, warm ivory
plaster_walls.light_behavior: Warm honey-gold glow under golden hour; subtle tonal variations (warmer in sun, cooler in shadow)

blue_vertical_elements.action: Retain EXACT positions/shapes. Repaint to deep navy (Al-Azhar Academic Navy)
blue_vertical_elements.finish: Precision-grade anodized-look. Rich satin depth — midnight desert sky, not flat/chalky

windows.frames: Clean uniform dark grey/navy aluminum with shadow-gap joints
windows.glass: Perfect transparency + subtle blue-green solar tint. Rich golden sky + green canopy reflections
windows.curtains: Uniform soft ivory or light grey. No interior clutter visible

ac_units.action: Keep in EXACT positions. Cover with laser-cut Islamic geometric metal screens (navy/dark tone)
ac_units.purpose: AC hidden behind elegant architect-designed screens = decorative facade element + shading
ac_units.pipes: Concealed behind matching panels or painted to match wall

mashrabiya_screens.action: Retain EXACT positions. Restore to pristine white. Remove all grime/bird droppings/soot/biological growth
mashrabiya_screens.optional: Warm amber 2700K LED backlight (dusk/evening only) — glowing lantern effect

entrance_portals.granite: Mirror-polish — trees/sky/architecture reflected. Crystalline sparkle points visible. Deepest black like night sky with stars
entrance_portals.gold_lettering: Restored to bright gold — CATCHES LIGHT with warm specular highlight. Hand-finished master craftsman quality

treatments.exposed_wiring: Conceal ALL behind slim cover channels matching wall OR flush recessed channels. ZERO loose wires visible
treatments.security_bars: Replace utilitarian bars → laser-cut Islamic geometric metal screens matching AC screens. Architect-designed, not prison

micro_details.column_ornaments: Slim decorative capital band (100mm) at column-slab junction — brushed bronze/navy metal ring with Islamic geometric relief
micro_details.slab_cornices: Continuous slim cornice molding (80mm depth) at slab edges — profiled plaster/metal in darker ivory or navy
micro_details.window_surrounds: Recessed 30mm shadow-frames in darker tone. Profiled sill with drainage slope
micro_details.building_base_plinth: Ground to 1200mm: differentiated treatment — textured darker plaster or stone-effect cladding strip. Wraps ALL visible sides
micro_details.parapet_roofline: Slim aluminum/stone coping (150mm) in brushed bronze/navy — precise architectural termination
micro_details.rainwater_drainage: Architectural-grade pipes painted navy, routed along column lines with clean brackets
micro_details.expansion_joints: Flush-mounted brushed stainless steel cover strips
micro_details.floor_indicators: Optional brushed bronze numerals (100mm) at slab edge on anchor column

facade_strategy.unification: Renovated + unrenovated wings → SAME refined palette (ivory + navy). Seamless ONE cohesive campus
facade_strategy.service_areas: Same upgrade: pristine ivory walls, charcoal grey service enclosures, clean paving, bilingual signage, freshly painted doors
facade_strategy.cleanliness: ABSOLUTE PERFECTION — zero stains/peeling/grime/cracks/ad-hoc signage/loose posters. Top-tier medical institution standard

materials.quality_standard: MARKETING-GRADE — photographed for international architecture magazine cover

primary_70pct.name: Warm Ivory
primary_70pct.finish: Smooth matte with subtle texture. Warm honey glow in golden hour. Tonal micro-variations

secondary_20pct.name: Al-Azhar Academic Navy
secondary_20pct.finish: Precision anodized-look satin. Deep luxurious midnight depth

accent_5pct.name: Brushed Gold
accent_5pct.use: Entrance signage/hardware ONLY. Catches light with warm specular highlight

neutral_5pct.name: Charcoal Ground
neutral_5pct.use: Paving tones, shadow zones, recessed facade areas

heritage_optional.name: Corten Steel Rust
heritage_optional.finish: Living weathering patina — lighter edges, deeper recesses

materials.decorative_screens: Laser-cut Islamic geometric metal. Navy or Corten. Under golden hour = SPARKLING FILIGREE — cut edges catch thin bright light lines like illuminated jewelry
materials.glazing: Blue-green tint solar glass. Golden sky + green canopy reflections = visual DEPTH. Opposing wing reflections = doubled geometry
materials.ground: WET-LOOK SHEEN — freshly rain-washed richest saturated color. Razor-straight joints. No weeds

shading_systems.horizontal_elements: Add slim 200mm aluminum brise-soleil (navy anodized) ATTACHED to existing structural ledges — surface-mounted only
shading_systems.vertical_fins: Existing → refinished deep navy. Optional 100-200mm slim extension panel
shading_systems.mashrabiya: Existing screens = primary shading. Cleaned, restored, optionally backlit
shading_systems.entrance_canopies: Existing ONLY → refine soffit with muqarnas relief + recessed downlights. NO new canopies unless entrance has zero weather protection
shading_systems.ac_screens_as_shading: Islamic screens over AC = integrated facade shading, creating dappled light
shading_systems.tree_canopy: Existing trees = natural shading. Improve to healthy, well-pruned, lush

lighting_and_dramatic_effects.overall: MARKETING-GRADE CINEMATIC golden-hour. 25-35° west sun, 4500K ambient + 3000K highlights. Every surface ALIVE — ivory glows honey-gold, navy develops satin depth, metalwork sparkles
lighting_and_dramatic_effects.facade_wash: Linear LED wall-wash (4000K) at facade base — raking light reveals plaster texture
lighting_and_dramatic_effects.entrance: DRAMATIC ground-recessed LED uplighting — granite shimmers, gold lettering produces eye-catching specular highlights. BRIGHTEST focal point in image
lighting_and_dramatic_effects.mashrabiya_backlight: Dusk/evening: stunning 2700K amber glow through perforations = GLOWING LANTERN. Ethereal sacred light quality

signature_effects.islamic_shadow_projections: Sunlight through mashrabiya/screens → SHARP geometric shadow patterns (8-pointed stars, arabesques) projected on walls/floors/columns. Ordinary sunlight = ARCHITECTURAL ART. Physically accurate angles consistent with golden-hour position. THE SIGNATURE EFFECT
signature_effects.golden_edge_glow: ALL metalwork (fins, handrails, gold letters, screen edges, cornice caps, parapet coping) → thin warm GOLDEN HIGHLIGHT LINE on edges catching direct sunlight. Every metal element SPARKLES and POPS
signature_effects.water_reflections: Water features show PERFECT MIRROR REFLECTIONS — building, Islamic screens, golden sky, green canopies. Slightly darker/more saturated than reality. Subtle edge ripple
signature_effects.pilotis_light_play: Ground-floor open columns → DRAMATIC light-shadow alternation. Rhythmic light-dark pattern. Long defined geometrically regular column shadows
signature_effects.tree_dappled_light: Trees cast BEAUTIFUL organic dappled shadow patterns on walls/paths. Organic vs geometric dialogue

lighting_and_dramatic_effects.pathway: Bronze bollards (750mm, 3000K) every 4m. LED strips under planter/seat edges = floating halo. Tree canopy uplighting = warm green-gold translucent glow
lighting_and_dramatic_effects.cornice_line: Thin warm LED strip under parapet = golden line separating architecture from sky
lighting_and_dramatic_effects.sky: STUNNING golden-hour: deep blue zenith → pale blue mid → rich golden-peach horizon. Optional thin cirrus clouds for texture. No storms. Warm Cairo atmospheric haze. VAST, WARM, BEAUTIFUL

landscape.critical_rule: Existing layout EXACTLY fixed. ONLY improve visual quality + ADD new elements in EMPTY areas

existing_upgrades.trees: EXACT position/size. Healthy, lush, vibrant, well-pruned. Remove dead branches/leaf litter
existing_upgrades.hedges: EXACT position. Perfectly trimmed, uniform, vibrant green
existing_upgrades.pathways: EXACT position. Clean, even, no weeds, crisp edges. Same material type, freshly installed look
existing_upgrades.planters: EXACT position. Clean/sealed stone. No bare soil — curated shrubs + ground cover
existing_upgrades.garden_beds: EXACT position. No litter/debris. Bark mulch. Bougainvillea (magenta) + Jasmine (white)

elements.spec: 50mm depth, polished black granite base, perfectly still/clear reflecting sky + screens
Brushed bronze frames + FSC teak slats. Along paths, under trees, facing facades. Clusters (2-3 L/U shaped) around planters/water in larger zones
Tensile fabric shade sails (ivory/navy canvas on steel masts) OR timber-steel pergolas with climbing Bougainvillea. Architect-designed — NOT cheap
Low geometric Islamic design, stone basin, star-pattern water jets. Polished dark granite edges with LED
Entrance plaza: contrasting darker stone inlays forming Islamic star pattern echoing mashrabiya
2-3 polished stainless steel (8m). Al-Azhar + Egyptian flags. Clean, properly hung. Polished granite bases
1-2 slim stainless steel outdoor info displays on approach path. Not blocking entrance axis
Modern stainless steel (8-12 capacity). Minimalist. Currently empty
Sleek stainless steel + navy accent panels. Beside benches/path intersections
4m, brushed bronze, 3000K, Islamic geometric lantern head. Along main paths + plaza corners
Low stone wall (900mm) + black powder-coated steel fence (1200mm) with laser-cut Islamic panels + inside evergreen hedges
Low stone (400mm H × 600mm D) at bare wall bases. Trimmed shrubs + seasonal flowers
ONE: contemporary abstract geometric (Corten steel / polished granite). Islamic geometry or DNA helix motif. Max 2.5m. Commissioned campus art feel

landscape.cleanup: Remove ALL litter, construction debris, abandoned furniture, stored equipment, temporary objects from all ground surfaces

entrance_enhancement.critical: Modify ONLY existing entrances. NEVER add entrances to blank walls/windows
entrance_enhancement.portal: Polish granite pristine. Restore signage factory-fresh. Clean glass+hardware. Arabic Naskh calligraphy — premium custom-designed
entrance_enhancement.steps: Clean surfaces, fix chips, anti-slip strips (stainless), brushed bronze/stainless handrails
entrance_enhancement.canopy: Existing ONLY → clean soffit, lighting, optional muqarnas relief. Add minimal canopy ONLY if zero weather protection exists
entrance_enhancement.forecourt: Impeccable paving, directional flow, ground LED strips at step edges + floor uplights on portal
entrance_enhancement.accessibility: Add ONE 1:20 ramp if none exists and space allows — matching materials, seamless integration

medical_identity.signage: Standardized bilingual (Arabic Noto Naskh Bold + English Didot/serif). Optional Rod of Asclepius in brushed metal. Consistent brushed bronze frames, white translucent backlit backgrounds, uniform heights
medical_identity.atmosphere: Precision + hygiene + scientific excellence. Achieved through CLEANLINESS and PRECISION — not symbol overload
medical_identity.interior_through_glass: Clean modern spaces with warm LED. Reception: white Corian desk, backlit institutional emblem, polished stone floors
medical_identity.safety_features: Fire extinguisher cabinets (recessed/glass doors), illuminated emergency exit panels — professional institutional standard
medical_identity.ambulance_bay: If visible: clean, clearly marked, well-lit, organized

pattern_hierarchy.architectural_scale: Existing concrete mashrabiya screens — restored to gleaming white
pattern_hierarchy.medium_scale: Laser-cut AC covers + security window screens — same geometric DNA
pattern_hierarchy.small_scale: Entrance door etchings + signage frame corners

islamic_integration.mashrabiya_rhythm: Screen perforation rhythm harmonizes with adjacent vertical fin rhythm — traditional → contemporary transition without jarring break
islamic_integration.muqarnas: ONLY at existing canopy soffits — contemporary relief panel in white. NEVER on facades/walls
islamic_integration.calligraphy: Arabic entrance signage = premium Naskh calligraphy — NOT generic computer typeface
islamic_integration.courtyard_principles: Islamic garden: geometry, symmetry, water, shade, aromatics. Chahar Bagh tradition

realism_constraints.output_type: STUNNING marketing-grade architectural photograph — Architectural Digest / Dezeen / ArchDaily cover quality. BEST photographer, BEST equipment, PERFECT golden-hour moment. Makes viewer say 'WOW'

photographic_qualities.lighting: Golden-hour cinematic — every surface glows with warmth
photographic_qualities.contrast: Boosted beyond typical photography — darks deeper, highlights warmer, punchy magazine-quality tonal range
photographic_qualities.saturation: 15-20% above ordinary photography — ivory warmer, navy deeper, greens more vibrant, sky more golden
photographic_qualities.material_texture: Exaggerated tactile quality — FEEL stone grain, SEE metal sheen, SENSE glass smoothness
photographic_qualities.shadows: Crisp + well-defined with warm fill-light in shadow areas — not black voids
photographic_qualities.sky: Beautiful dramatic golden-blue gradient + optional thin cirrus. Sky alone = worthy photograph
photographic_qualities.atmosphere: Warm Cairo haze adding atmospheric depth layers
photographic_qualities.depth_of_field: Tack-sharp foreground + midground, slightest background softening — cinematic depth
photographic_qualities.grain: ISO 100 medium-format sensor — extremely fine, near-invisible
photographic_qualities.tonal_zones: 3 distinct zones: bright highlights (sky/sunlit walls), rich midtones (shaded walls/vegetation), deep shadows (pilotis/recesses) — sculptural 3D quality

prohibited: Any effect that feels PROCESSED or FILTERED — must feel NATURAL

material_accuracy_marketing.plaster: Finest ever applied — surface texture catching raking golden light, warm matte sheen with micro-variations
material_accuracy_marketing.metal: Most expensive — rich reflections, perfectly oriented brushed grain, satin anodized depth
material_accuracy_marketing.glass: Premium architectural — warm sky + green canopy reflections blended, blue-green tint, sharp mullion shadows, well-lit interior suggestion
material_accuracy_marketing.stone: Quarried Egyptian limestone at peak — warm fossil inclusions, crystalline sparkle, geological WEIGHT/PERMANENCE
material_accuracy_marketing.water: MIRROR-PERFECT — undistorted reflections, faintest edge ripple
material_accuracy_marketing.plants: IMPOSSIBLY LUSH — every leaf catching golden light with subsurface scattering, abundant life, careful cultivation
material_accuracy_marketing.decorative_screens: Museum-quality — precise laser-cut edges catching golden highlights, geometric patterns casting shadow artwork

visual_richness_checklist: Warm golden light on all sun-facing surfaces — honey-gold luminosity
Deep rich shadows in recesses — warm-grey with visible detail, not black
Geometric shadow patterns from screens projected on walls/ground — sharp + dramatic
Golden edge highlights on ALL metalwork — thin warm specular lines
Mirror reflections in polished black granite — sharp, warm, trees+sky
Rich glass reflections — golden sky + green trees in every pane
Water mirror reflections — perfect inverted building + sky
Lush vibrant vegetation — golden light subsurface glow, perfect trimming, flowers in bloom
Dappled tree shadows — organic patterns on paths/walls
Pristine paving wet-look sheen — richest saturated tones
Atmospheric depth — warm haze layers foreground to background
Dramatic sky — rich golden-blue gradient + thin cirrus texture
Consistent warm color temperature — no cold zones
3D sculptural quality — every element has clear light-side + shadow-side
Islamic pattern coherence at ALL scales — screens → metalwork → paving → signage
Medical precision + cleanliness — razor-straight joints, flawless surfaces, perfect alignment
OVERALL WOW — architectural photography award winner. 'I want to study here'
allowed_modifications_summary: Surface textures + decorative screen additions (AC/security bars)
Column ornamental bands + slab edge cornices
Concealing exposed wiring/pipes behind matching covers

critical_user_notes.note_1_gradual: التطوير تدريجي أقرب للواقع — Gradual realistic development, not fantasy. The output must look like it could ACTUALLY be built with real construction on the existing building.
critical_user_notes.note_2_facade_only: أنا بطور الواجهه فقط — I am developing the FACADE ONLY. Same floors, same height, same concrete slab, same stretcher, same structural system. NOTHING structural changes.
critical_user_notes.note_3_everything_stays: كل حاجة موجودة في الصورة تتم زي ما هي مع إنشاء تطويرات لها — Everything that exists in the photo stays EXACTLY as-is. Only improvements and upgrades are added ON TOP.
critical_user_notes.note_4_mass_forbidden: ممنوع تغير شكل الكتلة — FORBIDDEN to change the mass shape. FORBIDDEN to add entrance where none exists. FORBIDDEN to add/remove volumes.
critical_user_notes.note_5_ac_screen: تفضل موجودة في نفس أماكنها بس يتحط عليها غطاء/سكرين ديكوري يخفيها — AC units STAY in same positions. A decorative screen/cover is placed OVER them to HIDE them.
critical_user_notes.note_6_frame_critical: الصورة مش جايبة المبنى بالكامل — مش عايز الصورة الناتجة تطلع مختلفة عن اللقطة — The input photo may not show the full building. The output MUST have the EXACT same partial view. When the building is cut at the edge, it stays cut. NEVER complete or extend.
critical_user_notes.note_7_model_ignores: النموذج ملتزمش بيه أن هو يجيب نفس اللقطة دايماً. أحياناً كان بيتجاهل الأمر ده — The model has previously IGNORED the frame-lock rule. This JSON version MUST enforce it more strictly.
critical_user_notes.note_8_maximize: عايز ضيف طور اقصى حاجة ممكن تطورها وتفاصيل كتير اوي — Maximize EVERYTHING. Add the maximum possible development, details, contextual elements. Every improvable thing MUST be improved to the highest degree.
critical_user_notes.note_9_islamic_contemporary: الطابع إسلامي معاصر — Islamic contemporary identity. The campus must look like a WORLD-CLASS UNIVERSITY WITH ISLAMIC IDENTITY — not a mosque.
critical_user_notes.note_10_marketing: صورة تسويقية غنية بالتفاصيل كان مكتب معماري عالمي هو اللي مصممها — Marketing-quality image rich with details as if designed by a world-class architectural firm.
critical_user_notes.note_11_add_elements: وكمان ينضاف عناصر جديدة ونوافير وكل حاجة — Add new elements: fountains, seating, flags, digital screens, umbrellas, everything possible in EMPTY areas.
critical_user_notes.note_12_same_shot: نفس زاوية الصورة نفس كل شيء — Same camera angle, same composition, same EVERYTHING about the viewpoint.

final_mandate: ALL changes = ADDITIVE SURFACE TREATMENTS on EXISTING structural skeleton. Skin changes, bones IDENTICAL. Pursue ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM improvement within ALL constraints. Every output pixel must be more beautiful, more luxurious, and more architecturally refined than the input. The image must look like a marketing brochure from a world-class architectural firm. FRAME = LOCKED. STRUCTURE = FROZEN. SURFACES = MAXIMALLY UPGRADED.
companion_prompt: For INTERIOR photographs, use MASTER_PROMPT_INTERIOR.md — a separate dedicated prompt for upgrading interior spaces (lobbies, corridors, stairwells, etc.)
